properties.remarks: King Sound, roughly 82 kilometres northwest of Cockatoo Island and 200 kilometres north-north-west of Derby in the Kimberley region

properties.name: Bessieres Island Lighthouse
properties.remarks: Bessieres Island is a small island off the Pilbara coast of north-west Australia

properties.remarks: King George Sound in the Great Southern

properties.name: Cape Bossut Lighthouse

properties.name: Cape Leeuwin Lighthouse

properties.name: Gantheaume Point Lighthouse
